name: S-12 merge preserves bundled keys not touched by the operator override (only override key wins) per §2.6 partial-override
command:
printf -- '- id: shared
  url: https://bundled.com
  tier: 1
  fetch_frequency: daily
' > catalog.yaml && printf -- '- id: shared
  url: https://operator.com
' > operator.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/merge-registry.sh" --catalog catalog.yaml --operator operator.yaml --emit merged.yaml && grep -q 'tier: 1' merged.yaml && grep -q 'fetch_frequency: daily' merged.yaml && grep -q 'url: https://operator.com' merged.yaml && echo preserved 1>&2
